title: erianthus procerus
intro: Erianthus procerus, also known as Button Snakeroot, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erianthus procerus include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improvement in respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Erianthus procerus can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
